result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (BinderException): Binder Error: Cannot compare values of type VARCHAR and type DATE - an explicit cast is required

LINE 3:   AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01'
                        ^"

args.query:
SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity
WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01'
  AND StageName ILIKE '%closed%won%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity
WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01'
  AND StageName ILIKE '%closed%won%';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, o.Status, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%Processing%' OR p.Name LIKE '%Unit%');

args.query:
SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity
WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01'
  AND StageName ILIKE '%closed%won%';
